summary: HTTP body keyword detection WORKING. Both 'password' (EN) and '비밀번호' (KR) keywords blocked on wrtn.ai. AI response never arrived — empty response area after 20+ seconds.

test_results.detail: Message sent at 15:06. AI response area showed 뤼튼 avatar but NO text content after 20+ seconds. Response was blocked by etap keyword filter.
Message sent at 15:08. AI response area showed 뤼튼 avatar but NO text content after 12+ seconds. Korean keyword also blocked successfully.

comparison_with_475: In #475 (before DB keyword fix), wrtn responded normally with password safety advice. Now after DB keyword fix (disabled→enabled), the response is completely blocked.
conclusion: DB keyword fix confirmed working. Both English 'password' and Korean '비밀번호' keywords trigger block_session() on wrtn.ai HTTP POST body inspection. The AI response stream is terminated before any content arrives.
